title: Trachyandra pyrenicarpa
taxonomy: Trachyandra pyrenicarpa belongs to the family Asphodelaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the asphodels. It is a genus of plants that are native to southern Africa. The genus Trachyandra is often included in the subfamily Asphodeloideae, which is a group of plants that are characterized by their strap-shaped leaves and inflorescences. The classification of Trachyandra pyrenicarpa is also sometimes considered to be within the family Xanthorrhoeaceae, depending on the source used. Further research may be needed to determine the most accurate classification for this plant.
